CreateRuleV2.state: Rule state after creation. Values: ENABLE (enabled), DISABLE (disabled)
CreateRuleV2.type: Rule type. Options: CRONTAB(scheduled scaling), ALARM(alarm-triggered scaling), PERIOD(periodic scaling)
CreateRuleV2.actionType: Action type. Options: INCREASE(scale out), DECREASE(scale in), ADJUST(adjust to)
CreateRuleV2.cronTime: Scheduled or periodic rule: execution time of the day, e.g. 12:30
CreateRuleV2.periodType: Periodic rule: period unit, options: DAY/WEEK/MONTH/CronExpression
CreateRuleV2.periodValue: Periodic rule: trigger date within the period; 1-7 for Mon-Sun, 1-31 for day of month; depends on periodType
CreateRuleV2.periodStartTime: Periodic rule: start time of the validity period, e.g. 2023-12-10T12:00:00Z
CreateRuleV2.periodEndTime: Periodic rule: end time of the validity period, e.g. 2023-12-11T12:00:00Z
CreateRuleV2.asAlarmRule: Alarm rule: alarm rule details, see appendix
CreateRuleV2.asAlarmRule.rules: Judgment rules for the scaling group rule; supports AND and OR logic
CreateRuleV2.asAlarmRule.alarmName: BCM policy ID; pass the unique ID of an existing BCM policy when reusing one
CreateRuleV2.asAlarmRule.insufficientCycle: Duration (in seconds) to trigger on no-data state
CreateRuleV2.asAlarmRule.ruleContents: Chinese description of the alarm rule content
CreateRuleV2.asAlarmRule.ruleContentsEn: English description of the alarm rule content
CreateRuleV2.asAlarmRule.source: Source from which the alarm policy was created
CreateRuleV2.asAlarmRule.componentType: Business component that the alarm policy originates from
CreateRuleV2.asAlarmRule.okActions: List of actions to execute when the alarm recovers
CreateRuleV2.asAlarmRule.insufficientActions: List of actions to execute when data is insufficient
